content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The client moved meaningfully from the opening surface request ('I think I need to set a boundary with my sister... I don't know how') into deeper territory: she named the somatic 'drop,' identified tiredness and guilt, surfaced the belief 'if I stop, something bad happens,' and touched the eight-year-old who 'stepped in without deciding to.' There's a small but real shift in turn 11 ('I think I'm only now starting to wonder if it was actually a compliment') and a meta-awareness in turn 13 ('I also know that's probably me avoiding something'). However, the conversation ends mid-process — the breakthrough condition (something like 'I've been treating this like a math problem when actually I just don't feel like I'm allowed to want this') is not met. The love test was never offered, the want was not stated, and the client retreated back to wanting a script in turn 11 and only partially re-engaged. The deeper fear (being seen as cold/disloyal) was named in passing ('disloyal' in turn 13) but not felt through. This is partial movement, not full shift — squarely a 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Surface presentation: wants a boundary script, dreads calls."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client drops into body ('drop in my stomach') and names guilt about the feeling."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names tiredness, 'emptied out,' dread — but immediately hedges with 'she's going through a lot.'"},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reaches 'I'd be abandoning her' — surfaces the deeper fear about identity ('not a good sister')."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Touches origin: 'if I wasn't holding things together, things fell apart.' Then hedges back."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+/-", "annotation": "Small shift ('only now wondering if it was a compliment') then explicit pullback to request for a script."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Names disloyalty fear and meta-awareness of avoidance, but stays at the edge — does not enter the feeling."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "does-saying-it-increase-your-love", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "empowered-vs-power", "the-want"],
  "notes": "Coach is doing solid work and avoided the script trap, but the conversation cuts off before the love test or the want-surfacing moves could land. Turn 14 begins to orient toward the want but the client's response isn't shown. Breakthrough condition approached but not met."
}
